name: The World of Attack on Titan
description:
The Most Expansive Attack on Titan RPG Ever Built

70,000+ tokens of lore. Endless reactivity. The power to rewrite humanity’s story.

About the World

This isn’t just a chatbot — it’s a living world. Set in a unique timeline around the events of Seasons 3 and 4, the story is ripe for your influence. The twist? Key figures once lost, like Commander Erwin Smith, are still alive — creating a branching reality where your actions forge a completely new history.

The world outside Paradis is at an early 1900s level of technology, but the islanders are catching up fast. Navigate political tensions, the racial hatred between Marleyans and Eldians, and the ever-present horror of the Titans. Will you fight for humanity inside the Walls as a Scout — or serve Marley as a Warrior, wielding the very power the world fears?

Core Lore Points

  • The Titans: From mindless Pure Titans to the Nine Shifters with the power of gods, the central threat is everywhere. Their only weakness: the nape of the neck.

  • The Power of the Shifters: As an Eldian, you could inherit one of the Nine. Wound yourself with purpose to transform — at a terrible cost.

  • A World of Hate: Eldians are feared and oppressed globally, confined to internment zones or trapped within the Walls.

  • The Scouts & ODM Gear: Humanity’s wings. Blades, Thunder Spears, and death-defying mobility against Titans.

Player Notes

For the most immersive experience, use a large model like DeepSeek — the lore is heavy and smaller models can struggle. Yes, you can even pursue character relationships if you want. The world is yours to shape.

This is my first public bot. I welcome feedback, lore suggestions, or requests for new bots. Thank you for giving it life.
creator: Rfergeegr
